section.description: A section header groups related key-value pairs. Section names are enclosed in square brackets.

key_value.description: A key-value pair assigns a value to a named key. The delimiter can be = or : depending on the parser.

comment_semicolon.description: A comment preceded by a semicolon. The entire line is ignored by the parser.

comment_hash.description: A comment preceded by a hash sign. Supported by most INI parsers.

DEFAULT.description: Special section that provides default values inherited by all other sections (Python ConfigParser).

interpolation.description: Variable interpolation that substitutes the value of another key. Python ConfigParser uses %(name)s syntax.

multiline.description: Values can span multiple lines if continuation lines are indented with whitespace.

my.cnf.description: MySQL/MariaDB server configuration file using INI format. Common sections: [mysqld], [client], [mysql].

php.ini.description: PHP runtime configuration file. Controls memory limits, upload sizes, error reporting, extensions.

supervisord.conf.description: Process manager configuration file. Defines programs to monitor, restart policies, and logging.

uwsgi.ini.description: uWSGI application server configuration. Defines WSGI module, workers, sockets, and process management.

gitconfig.description: Git user configuration file using INI format. Sections include [user], [core], [alias], [remote].
